summary: Iteration 78 tested 3 new features: (1) GET /api/dashboard/compliance-en1090 returns commesse with compliance percentages and docs status for 6 document types, (2) ComplianceWidget on Dashboard displays EN 1090 compliance status with progress bars, (3) Dialog z-index fix allows Radix Select to work inside modals. All 12 backend tests passed. UI tests verified: ComplianceWidget renders on Dashboard, clicking compliance row navigates to commessa, Fascicolo Tecnico section shows 6 document cards with completion indicators, Select dropdown works inside dialogs, Repository Documenti has filter dropdown structure (appears when >3 docs).

success_rate.frontend: Verified via Playwright - all features working

test_credentials: Test users created/cleaned during pytest run and UI tests
seed_data_creation: Test commesse with fascicolo_tecnico and fasi_produzione created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 adds: (1) Compliance dashboard widget - GET /api/dashboard/compliance-en1090 returns {commesse: [...], total: N} where each commessa has compliance_pct, docs (DOP/CE/Piano Ctrl/Rapporto VT/Reg. Saldatura/Riesame status with filled/total/complete), and prod_progress (done/total). Widget shows up to 5 commesse sorted by compliance_pct ascending. (2) Dialog z-index fix - onPointerDownOutside handler in DialogContent prevents closing when clicking Radix Select portal elements. SelectContent has z-[100] for proper stacking. (3) Repository Documenti filter - When docs.length > 3, a filter dropdown appears with data-testid='filter-doc-type' that filters documents by type using data-doc-type attribute.

compliance_en1090_commessa_data.details: Each commessa has compliance_pct, docs (6 types), prod_progress, numero, title, stato, classe_esecuzione

compliance_en1090_docs_status.details: docs object includes: DOP, CE, Piano Ctrl, Rapporto VT, Reg. Saldatura, Riesame with filled/total/complete

compliance_en1090_filters_active_states.details: Only returns commesse with stato in ['confermata', 'in_produzione'], excludes bozza

compliance_percentage_calculation.details: compliance_pct calculated based on shared_auto + doc-specific required fields

frontend_dashboard_loads.details: Dashboard page loads with KPI cards, chart, and widgets

frontend_compliance_widget.details: ComplianceWidget shows on dashboard with data-testid='widget-compliance'

frontend_compliance_widget_data.details: Widget shows commessa number, title, compliance %, doc status pills (DOP/CE/Piano/VT/Registro/Riesame), progress bar

frontend_fascicolo_tecnico_6_cards.details: Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 section shows 6 document cards: DOP, Marcatura CE, Piano di Controllo, Rapporto VT, Registro Saldatura, Riesame Tecnico

frontend_fascicolo_completion_indicators.details: Each card shows filled/total (e.g., 6/16), missing fields hints, Compila and PDF buttons

frontend_fascicolo_timeline.details: Timeline Produzione shows colored segments: green=completato, blue=in_corso, gray=da_fare

frontend_dialog_select_zindex.details: Select dropdown visible inside RdP dialog (z-[100] on SelectContent working)

frontend_dialog_onPointerDownOutside.details: Dialog stays open when clicking Select dropdown area (onPointerDownOutside fix working)

frontend_repository_filter_structure.details: Filter dropdown (data-testid='filter-doc-type') appears when docs.length > 3, uses data-doc-type attribute for filtering
